Name: MongoDB Atlas - Restore cluster from latest snapshot
Description: Allow the user to restore a cluster from the latest snapshot.
Author: claude-uceda

Parameters.Name: matlas-project-source
Parameters.Label: Project source's id
Parameters.HelpText: Project id of the cluster that will be the snapshot source.

Parameters.Name: matlas-cluster-source
Parameters.Label: Cluster source's name
Parameters.HelpText: Cluster that will be used to get the snapshot.

Parameters.Name: matlas-project-target
Parameters.Label: Project target's id
Parameters.HelpText: Project id of the cluster that will used to restore the snapshot.

Parameters.Name: matlas-cluster-target
Parameters.Label: Cluster target's name
Parameters.HelpText: Cluster that will be used to restore the snapshot.

Parameters.Name: matlas-check-delay-seconds
Parameters.Label: Status check delay
Parameters.HelpText: Delay in seconds between each statuses check.
